title: Task Garden Plan
description: Schema for Task Garden YAML plan files. Generated from the Zod source of truth at src/lib/plan/task-garden-plan.schema.ts.

last_updated.description: Date the plan was last edited, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

summary.description: One- or two-sentence description of the plan's goal.

estimate_unit.description: Unit all per-item estimates are expressed in. Defaults to days.

references.description: Top-level documentation references for the whole plan.

href.description: An http(s) URL or a file path resolved relative to the plan file's parent directory (no path traversal).

lanes.description: Logical groupings of work (e.g., 'backend', 'frontend'). At least one required.

id.description: Unique slug identifying this lane. Referenced by work_items.lane.

label.description: Display label shown in the UI.

description.description: Optional longer description of what this lane covers.

color.description: Optional CSS color string used for visual encoding.

work_items.description: Concrete tasks and their dependencies. At least one required. Must form a DAG (no cycles).

id.description: Unique slug identifying this work item. Referenced by depends_on entries.

summary.description: What this item delivers and why.

lane.description: ID of the lane this item belongs to. Must reference an existing lane.id.

status.description: Lifecycle state. planned = scoped, not started; ready = unblocked, can start; blocked = waiting; in_progress = active; done = complete; future = not yet fully scoped.

priority.description: Importance. p0 = must-have / blocking; p1 = important; p2 = nice quality improvement; p3 = low priority; nice_to_have = explicit stretch goal.

depends_on.description: IDs of work items that must be completed before this one can start. Must reference existing items; no self-references, duplicates, or cycles.

tags.description: Cross-cutting labels (slug format; may contain '/'). Useful for filtering across lanes.

estimate.description: Optional rough sizing for this item, expressed in the plan's estimate_unit.

deliverables.description: Concrete outputs produced when this item is done.

reuse_candidates.description: Existing code, libraries, or patterns worth considering when implementing this item.

links.description: External resources or local Markdown docs related to this item.

href.description: An http(s) URL or a file path resolved relative to the plan file's parent directory (no path traversal).

notes.description: Freeform context that doesn't fit other fields.
